title: ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT AND TAX PREPARATION - 211info
text: EL CENTRO NW ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT AND TAX PREPARATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) and helps with Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN). Also hosts financial literacy workshops for youth and their families to help make informed decisions, strengthen economic stability, and workshops for individuals who want to start a business or improve existing business. 300 S Roosevelt Drive Suite #5 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Latinx/Hispanic community members or Spanish language speakers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (971) 414-7270 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 414-7270 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Financial Literacy Training * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Taxpayer Identification Numbers * Hispanic/Latino Community Tax Preparation Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - OHP ASSISTANCE AND HEALTH NAVIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EL CENTRO NW
